title: Singularity mine
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Otheruses|singularity}} {{Weapon |image= |name=Singularity mine |manufacturer= |model= |type=[[Mine/Legends|Mine]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' |culture=[[Yuuzhan Vong]] |creators= |created=By [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |destroyed= |discovered= |owners= |locations= |cost= |value= |shape= |size=Tiny |material= |length= |width= |diam= |height= |weight= |protection= |crew= |capacity= |range= |inscription= |markings= |purpose= |heritage= |affiliation=Yuuzhan Vong }} {{Quote|Singularity mines. Nasty.''"
"''Analysis predicts obstacle impassable. All techniques for bypassing or clearing minefields will fail.''"
"''Remind me to speak with the brain department about your ingenuity routines.|Lando Calrissian and [[YVH 1-1A]], aboard the ''Byrt''|}} '''Singularity mines''' were small, [[Color/Legends|black]], seedpod-like [[Mine/Legends|mines]] used by members of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. They were capable of creating a two-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-wide [[Black hole/Legends|singularity]] via a [[dovin basal]] that crushed any being to [[Death/Legends|death]] who broke its shell and triggered it. In [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], Yuuzhan Vong–allied [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Viqi Shesh]] and Yuuzhan Vong [[Warrior caste|warriors]] used the mines to slow down a group of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] pursuers aboard the [[Transport/Legends|starferry]] ''[[Byrt]]'' over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. ==Description== [[Black hole/Legends|Singularity]] [[Mine/Legends|mines]] appeared like tiny [[Color/Legends|black]] seedpods, with some of them being [[Heart/Legends|heart]]-shaped, and each contained a miniature [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]]-manipulating [[dovin basal]]. The outer shell of the mine was weak enough to break when stepped upon. When the shell was broken, the dovin basal inside would create a singularity, instantaneously crushing to the size of molecules any nearby matter—[[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] or otherwise—within the singularity's two-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] diameter. Due to the mines' fragility and lethality, the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] only distributed them to the most experienced or expendable [[Warrior caste|warriors]].''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' ==History== {{Quote|Analysis?''"
"''Unknown caltrop device. High potential for biotoxin attack.|Lando Calrissian and YVH 1-1A encounter the mines|}} [[File:ViqiSheshHS-NEGTC.png|thumb|left|190px|Viqi Shesh used singularity mines aboard the ''Byrt''.]] Yuuzhan Vong warriors used singularity mines during the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], engaging such governments as the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. In [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], the Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|overran]] the New Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. During the chaos, Yuuzhan Vong–allied [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Viqi Shesh]] and [[Squad/Legends|squads]] of Yuuzhan Vong warriors boarded the [[Transport/Legends|starferry]] ''[[Byrt]]'' as it attempted to escape Coruscant, intent on capturing [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] infant son, [[Ben Skywalker|Ben]], who was aboard. Pursued by the entrepreneur [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and a unit of [[YVH-Series battle droid]]s through the corridors of the starferry, Shesh and some warriors deployed singularity mines to hinder or [[Death/Legends|kill]] those following them. [[YVH 1-25A]] was lost to the mines, though Calrissian and the other [[Droid/Legends|droids]] surpassed the obstacle by temporarily turning off the ''Byrt''{{'s}} [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]], thus causing the singularity mines to hit the walls and floor of the corridor and trigger. Shesh ultimately escaped both the ''Bryt'' and those following her, though Ben was kept safe during the fighting. ==Behind the scenes== Singularity mines first appeared in author [[Troy Denning]]'s [[2001]] novel, [[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star|''Star by Star'']], an installment of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Gravitational weaponry]] [[Category:Mines]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong weapons]]
